title: Asal Sayi Kontrolu
subtitle: Asal sayilari bulma ve test etme.
code:
def prime?(number)
  return false if number < 2

  (2..Integer.sqrt(number)).each do |i|
    return false if number % i == 0
  end
  true
end

puts "1-50 arasindaki asal sayilar:"
primes = (1..50).select { |n| prime?(n) }
puts primes.join(", ")

puts "\nToplam asal sayi adedi: #{primes.length}"

# Tekil kontrol
test_number = 97
puts "\n#{test_number} asal mi: #{prime?(test_number)}"

test_number = 100
puts "#{test_number} asal mi: #{prime?(test_number)}"

# Ruby'nin require 'prime' kutuphanesi ile alternatif (yorum olarak)
# require 'prime'
# Prime.prime?(97) => true
